articles.title: First Time Using SorryCode
articles.summary: Create an API key, choose and install a workbench, run your first task — three steps to get started with SorryCode, under 10 minutes from signup to AI doing real work.

articles.title: 第一次使用 SorryCode
articles.summary: 创建 API Key、选择并安装工作台、跑通第一个任务——三步完成 SorryCode 上手，10 分钟内让 AI 开始替你干活。

articles.title: What AI Actually Is
articles.summary: A single metaphor explains it all: AI is not magic, not a database, not a search engine. It's an intern who has read every book in the world but has a terrible memory.

articles.title: AI 到底是什么
articles.summary: 用“新员工”比喻一次讲清楚：AI 不是魔法、不是数据库、不是搜索引擎。它是一个读过很多书但记性不好的实习生——理解这个，你就理解了所有 AI 工具的共同底层。

articles.title: Why AI Is Different Now
articles.summary: You tried AI in 2023 and found it underwhelming. But three breakthroughs — context windows, tool use, and reasoning — have combined to turn AI from an advisor into a worker.

articles.title: 为什么现在的 AI 不一样了
articles.summary: 你 2023 年试过 AI，感觉一般。但三个底层突破——上下文、工具、推理——叠加在一起，让 AI 从“顾问”变成了“员工”。这不是营销话术，是工程事实。

articles.title: Agent: From Chat to Work
articles.summary: Chat AI answers you. Agent does work for you. This isn't rebranding — an Agent can read your files, execute commands, and operate your browser.

articles.title: Agent：从聊天到干活
articles.summary: 聊天 AI 回答你，Agent 替你干活。这不是换个名字——Agent 能读你的文件、执行命令、操作浏览器，它就是你电脑上的操作员。

articles.title: Talking to AI Is Not Spellcasting
articles.summary: The internet is full of god-tier prompt templates. The truth: a prompt is just a work order — be clear about what you want, what you don't want, what done looks like, and the background.

articles.title: 跟 AI 说话，不是念咒
articles.summary: 网上到处是“神级 Prompt 模板”，好像跟 AI 说话需要学一门新语言。真相是：Prompt 就是工作指令——说清楚要什么、不要什么、什么算做完、有什么背景。好的 Prompt 是迭代出来的。

articles.title: How to Manage AI's Memory
articles.summary: After a long chat, AI starts talking nonsense? It didn't get dumber — the context got dirty. Think of AI's context as your desk: stable rules pinned to the wall, current task on the desk, junk in the trash.

articles.title: AI 的“记性”怎么管
articles.summary: 跟 AI 聊久了它开始胡说八道？不是它变笨了，是上下文脏了。把 AI 的上下文想象成你的工作台——稳定规则贴在墙上，当前任务放在桌上，废料扔掉。管好上下文，比写好 Prompt 更重要。

articles.title: When to Trust AI and When Not To
articles.summary: The most dangerous thing about AI isn't that it makes mistakes — it's that it looks equally confident whether right or wrong. Build calibration: review in domains you know, cross-check in domains you don't.

articles.title: 什么时候信 AI，什么时候别信
articles.summary: AI 最危险的不是它会犯错——是它犯错的时候看起来特别自信。建立校准能力：你懂的领域你审它，你不懂的领域交叉验证它，永远不要用 AI 的自信程度来判断它的正确程度。

articles.title: Tools, Models, Platforms — Stop Confusing Them
articles.summary: GPT, Claude, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, DeepSeek — these names fall into three layers: models are the brain, workbenches are the body, platforms are the infrastructure. Don't chase model names.

articles.title: 工具、模型、平台，别再分不清
articles.summary: GPT、Claude、Codex、Claude Code、Cursor、DeepSeek、豆包、Kimi——这些名字分三层：模型是大脑，工作台是身体，平台是后勤。别追模型名字，先想清楚你在哪里产出工作，就选那里的 Agent。

articles.title: Where to Start
articles.summary: All the concepts are covered. Now three paths: just curious — try web chat AI first. Have a specific task — install an Agent and complete one deliverable. Completing one small task beats reading ten tutorials.

articles.title: 从哪开始
articles.summary: 概念都讲完了。现在三条路：纯尝鲜先用网页聊天 AI 感受一下；有具体任务装一个 Agent 跑通第一个成果；系统性用起来先建立你的项目规则文件。先跑通一个小任务，比看完十篇教程都有用。

articles.title: Who SorryCode Is For
articles.summary: Use one balance and separate API keys to try Codex, Claude Code, image generation, and Skills before committing to multiple subscriptions.

articles.title: SorryCode 适合谁
articles.summary: 如果你想用一份余额体验 Codex、Claude Code、图片生成和 Skills，而不是先订阅多个产品，先看这页。

articles.title: How AI Cost Works
articles.summary: Do not judge cost by visible reply length. Understand input, output, cache, and group multipliers before comparing model cost.

articles.title: AI 成本怎么计算
articles.summary: 不要按回复字数判断成本。先理解 input、output、cache 和分组倍率，再比较模型消耗。

articles.title: Create API Key
articles.summary: Understand what an API key is, then create separate sk-... keys for Codex, Claude Code, Skills, or other uses.

articles.title: 创建 API Key
articles.summary: 先理解 API Key 是什么，再按 Codex、Claude Code 或 Skills 等用途分别创建 sk-... 密钥。

articles.title: First Request
articles.summary: Use one minimal request to validate the API key, Base URL, and network path. This page is a manual-path and troubleshooting reference, not the default beginner entry.

articles.title: 首条请求
articles.summary: 用一条最小请求验证 API Key、Base URL 和网络链路都正常工作。

articles.summary: Understand Codex first, prepare your API key, finish one-click install, and start using it right away.

articles.title: Codex
articles.summary: 先认识 Codex，再准备 API Key，完成一键安装，然后直接开始用。

articles.title: Claude Code
articles.summary: Understand Claude Code first, prepare your API key, finish one-click install, and start using it right away.

articles.title: Claude Code
articles.summary: 先认识 Claude Code，再准备 API Key，完成一键安装，然后直接开始用。

articles.title: Claude Desktop
articles.summary: Enable the third-party inference gateway in Claude Desktop and connect requests to SorryCode.

articles.title: Claude Desktop
articles.summary: 在 Claude Desktop 里启用第三方推理网关，把模型请求接到 SorryCode。

articles.title: Grok
articles.summary: Understand Grok first, prepare your API key, finish one-click install, and start using it right away.

articles.title: Grok
articles.summary: 先认识 Grok，再准备 API Key，完成一键安装，然后直接开始用。

articles.title: GPT Image 2
articles.summary: Generate images with natural language in Codex, or use gpt-image-2 through the SorryCode Images API and SorryCode Image2 Skill.

articles.title: GPT Image 2
articles.summary: 在 Codex 中直接用自然语言生图，或通过 SorryCode Images API 和 SorryCode Image2 Skill 使用 gpt-image-2。

articles.title: Grok Image Generation
articles.summary: Use a SorryCode API key with Grok Imagine image models, then read the temporary image URL from the response.

articles.title: Grok 图片生成
articles.summary: 使用 SorryCode API Key 调用 Grok Imagine 图片模型，生成图片并读取返回的临时 URL。

articles.title: Grok Video Generation
articles.summary: Submit Grok text-to-video or image-to-video jobs through SorryCode, then poll the request_id until the job is done, failed, or expired.

articles.title: Grok 视频生成
articles.summary: 通过 SorryCode 提交 Grok 文生视频或图生视频任务，并使用 request_id 轮询到完成、失败或过期。

articles.title: Creation and Design
articles.summary: The entry point for images, posters, one-pagers, resumes, reports, portfolios, and presentation work.

articles.title: 创作与设计
articles.summary: 图片、海报、一页纸、简历、报告、作品集和演示表达的入口。先判断你要生成图片、处理内容，还是做 PPT / slides。

articles.title: What Are Skills
articles.summary: A skill is an instruction manual for the agent. After installing Codex or Claude Code, use skills to make image work, document design, slides, project reading, and engineering workflows more reliable.

articles.title: Skills 是什么
articles.summary: Skill 是给 agent 读的操作说明书。装好 Codex 或 Claude Code 后，用 Skills 让 agent 稳定完成图片、排版、PPT、读项目和工程流程。

articles.title: Office Docs
articles.summary: The entry point for existing Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF files. For new polished artifacts, go to Creation and Design.

articles.title: 办公文档
articles.summary: Word、Excel、PowerPoint、PDF 这类已有办公文件的处理入口。想从零做成品，请去创作与设计。

articles.title: Waza
articles.summary: A full engineering-habits skill pack. Use it to think before building, debug by root cause, design with direction, learn from sources, write naturally, and check before shipping.

articles.title: Waza
articles.summary: 一整套工程习惯包。让你在做功能、查 bug、写界面、读资料、改文案、提交前检查时，都有更稳的协作路径。

articles.title: DBSkill
articles.summary: A business diagnosis and content decision toolkit by dontbesilent. Use it to diagnose business questions, find benchmarks, review content direction, improve hooks and titles, and inspect execution blocks.

articles.title: DBSkill
articles.summary: dontbesilent 的商业诊断与内容决策工具箱。帮你判断商业问题、找对标、做内容诊断、优化开头标题，也能处理执行力和概念混乱。

articles.title: How to Use Design Skills
articles.summary: Design, decks, images, and writing usually need iteration. Use skills to create an editable first draft, then guide the agent with specific feedback.

articles.title: 设计类 Skills 怎么用
articles.summary: 设计、PPT、图片和写作这类产物通常需要迭代。用 skill 先得到可修改的初稿，再通过具体反馈逐步靠近你要的结果。

articles.title: DOCX
articles.summary: A skill for Word documents: reading, editing, preserving formatting, comments, and tracked changes.

articles.title: DOCX
articles.summary: 处理 Word 文档的 skill。适合读取、编辑、保留格式、处理批注和修订。

articles.title: SorryCode Image2
articles.summary: Generate or edit images with gpt-image-2 while saving prompts, responses, diagnostics, and image files for reproducible project workflows.

articles.title: SorryCode Image2
articles.summary: 使用 gpt-image-2 生成或编辑图片，并保存 prompt、响应、诊断和图片文件。适合需要固定输出和可复现工作流的进阶任务。

articles.title: Kami
articles.summary: A design-focused skill for finished documents. Use it for one-pagers, long docs, resumes, portfolios, and slide decks.

articles.title: Kami
articles.summary: 一个面向成品文档的设计型 skill。适合做一页纸、长文、简历、作品集，也适合直接做演讲幻灯片。

articles.title: XLSX
articles.summary: A skill for Excel workbooks: data cleaning, formulas, charts, analysis, and reporting.

articles.title: XLSX
articles.summary: 处理 Excel 表格的 skill。适合数据清洗、公式、图表、经营分析和报表整理。

articles.title: Guizang PPT Skill
articles.summary: An evolving presentation-making skill for agent-built single-file HTML decks, visual systems, deck images, and platform covers.

articles.title: 藏师傅的 PPT Skill
articles.summary: 一个持续进化的 PPT 制作 skill。适合用 agent 生成有明确设计系统的单文件 HTML 演示，也能承接配图和平台封面。

articles.title: PPTX
articles.summary: A skill for native PowerPoint files: editing existing decks, using templates, and preparing reports or pitch decks.

articles.title: PPTX
articles.summary: 处理 PowerPoint 原生文件的 skill。适合修改已有 PPT、套模板、整理汇报材料和路演稿。

articles.title: PDF
articles.summary: A skill for PDFs: reading, extracting text and tables, splitting, merging, filling forms, and organizing material.

articles.title: PDF
articles.summary: 处理 PDF 的 skill。适合读取、提取文字和表格、拆分合并、填表和整理资料。

articles.title: CC-Switch
articles.summary: An advanced config-switching tool for graphical endpoint, API key, and multi-runtime configuration management.

articles.title: CC-Switch
articles.summary: 进阶配置切换工具。适合需要图形化管理 endpoint、API Key 和多 runtime 配置的人。

articles.title: Mole
articles.summary: A local Mac maintenance tool. Start by seeing where disk space went, then preview cleanup for dev caches, installers, app leftovers, and temporary files.

articles.title: Mole
articles.summary: 一个 Mac 本地维护工具。先看清空间被什么占用，再安全预览清理开发缓存、安装包、App 残留和临时文件。

articles.title: VS Code
articles.summary: An optional visual project workspace. Open folders, inspect files and diffs, and install Codex / Claude Code extensions when needed.

articles.title: VS Code
articles.summary: 一个可选的可视化项目工作台。用它打开项目、查看文件和改动，并按需安装 Codex / Claude Code 插件。

articles.title: Open Design
articles.summary: An open-source design workbench that combines local agent CLIs, skills, DESIGN.md design systems, and artifact preview.

articles.title: Open Design
articles.summary: 一个开源设计工作台。把本地 agent CLI、Skills、DESIGN.md 设计系统和 artifact preview 组织成完整设计生产链路。

articles.title: Open Slide
articles.summary: A tool for creating React slide decks with Codex or Claude Code. Useful for code-based decks, comments, presentation mode, and HTML/PDF export.

articles.title: Open Slide
articles.summary: 用 Codex 或 Claude Code 写 React 幻灯片的工具。适合代码式 deck、评论修改、演讲预览和 HTML/PDF 导出。

articles.title: HyperFrames
articles.summary: A toolchain for writing HTML video compositions with agents, then previewing and rendering them as MP4. Useful for product videos, launch motion, intros, and social clips.

articles.title: HyperFrames
articles.summary: 用 agent 写 HTML 视频 composition，再预览和渲染成 MP4 的工具链。适合产品短视频、发布动效、课程片头和社媒视频。

articles.title: What to do when old Codex sessions disappear after switching providers
articles.summary: Use codex-history to find local Codex sessions and resume the right one.

articles.title: Codex 换 provider 后，旧 session 找不到了怎么办
articles.summary: 用 codex-history 找回本机 Codex 历史 session，并继续 resume。

articles.title: Node.js
articles.summary: Shared environment troubleshooting for macOS and Windows. Use it for manual setup or when one-click install gets blocked.

articles.title: Node.js
articles.summary: macOS / Windows 的共享环境排障页。主要服务手动安装和一键安装失败后的环境定位。

articles.title: Windows PowerShell
articles.summary: The Windows terminal entry for SorryCode one-click install: how to open it, paste commands, and avoid shell or encoding mistakes.

articles.title: Windows PowerShell
articles.summary: Windows 用户运行 SorryCode 一键安装时的终端入口：怎么打开、粘贴命令、避免混用 shell 和编码问题。

articles.title: Common Questions
articles.summary: The shortest fix path by error code and symptom.

articles.title: 常见问题
articles.summary: 按错误码和现象给出最短修复路径。

articles.title: Plugins vs Skills - What's the Difference
articles.summary: Plugins give agents new tools, while Skills teach agents how to work. They have different use cases, installation methods, and calling syntax.

articles.title: Plugins 和 Skills 有什么区别
articles.summary: Plugins 给 agent 提供新工具，Skills 教 agent 怎么做事。两者的适用场景、安装方式和调用语法不同。

articles.title: How AI Remembers What You Said
articles.summary: Tired of repeating yourself? Three ways to make AI remember your work style, design preferences, and project rules long-term.

articles.sectionTitle: 让 AI 记住你的要求
articles.title: AI 怎么记住我说过的话
articles.summary: 每次都要重新解释？三种方式让 AI 长期记住你的工作方式、设计风格和项目规则。

articles.title: What to Do When Sessions Get Too Long
articles.summary: Sessions getting longer and you don't know when to clear? Understand cache, handoff, and long-term context management.

articles.sectionTitle: 让 AI 记住你的要求
articles.title: 会话太长怎么办
articles.summary: 会话越跑越长，不知道什么时候该清空？理解缓存、handoff 和长期上下文的管理方式。

articles.title: Make AI Remember Project Rules
articles.summary: Write an AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md file to make AI remember which files not to change, what commands to use, and what rules to follow.

articles.sectionTitle: 让 AI 记住你的要求
articles.title: 让 AI 记住项目规则
articles.summary: 写一份 AGENTS.md 或 CLAUDE.md，让 AI 记住哪些文件不能改、用什么命令、遵守什么规则。

articles.title: Make AI Remember Your Design Style
articles.summary: Write a DESIGN.md file to make AI follow your brand colors, fonts, and visual style every time it generates images, decks, or web pages.

articles.sectionTitle: 让 AI 记住你的要求
articles.title: 让 AI 记住你的设计风格
articles.summary: 写一份 DESIGN.md，让 AI 每次生成图片、PPT、网页时都遵守你的品牌色、字体和视觉风格。

articles.title: Make AI Remember Work Methods
articles.summary: Turn repetitive workflows into Skills, making AI remember how to do images, documents, code review, and other tasks.

articles.sectionTitle: 让 AI 记住你的要求
articles.title: 让 AI 记住工作方法
articles.summary: 把重复的工作流做成 Skill，让 AI 记住怎么做图片、文档、代码审查等任务。
